params.name: The Mediterranean
params.description:
On Apr 10, 1902 AD, Maillol began to create the Mediterranean Sculpture.
Maillol's Mediterranean Sculpture, his first significant work, is a classic representation of his artistic style. Combining classicism with his own unique vision, Maillol created a contemplative female figure that captures the softness and beauty of the human form, reminiscent of ancient Greek sculpture, turning the whole statue's posture and style into a symbol of the Mediterranean. This sculpture established Maillol's …
